title: Local preparedness for synthetic opioids in England
body: "This report summarises analysis and recommendations developed from a review of Combating Drugs Partnership (CDPs) synthetic opioid preparedness plans, and a  tabletop exercise conducted with a range of relevant local partners.  The report offers evidence and insights for CDPs, especially public health and law enforcement leads, intending to help strengthen their preparedness for an evolving threat. The report also informs national initiatives on this topic. Many of the principles and recommendations discussed are relevant to multiple drug types. "
